title: Project Manager (High Speed Rail) - MENA Region
description_raw:
TRS Staffing are recruiting an experienced Project Manager for a flagship High Speed Rail programme across the MENA Region. The role oversees design and delivery management for a major rail infrastructure expansion.

Key responsibilities:
- Lead the end-to-end project delivery lifecycle from GRIP Stage 3 through Stage 8
- Manage programme schedule, risk register, and stakeholder engagement across the project board
- Coordinate multi-disciplinary design teams covering civils, track, signalling, and rolling stock interfaces
- Report to the Programme Director on cost (EVM), schedule, and QHSE performance

Requirements:
- 8+ years rail project management experience
- APM PMQ or PRINCE2 Practitioner
- Experience on international rail programmes preferred

Rate: £650 per day
Duration: 12 months
Start: September 2026
